title: Voiceless Survival
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e848b46b61801d90eb7cf4a9934647fa96aa1e46.png) **_Thank you for 200k+ downloads!_**❤️ Ily;) Have feedback or ideas? [Join our Discord.](https://discord.gg/jqBFMhnJPe) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20downloads&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/JJ3q7W2X&style=flat&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/voiceless-survival) --- **IMPORTANT - 2.0.0 VERSION** This update brings major system changes. Review your configs after updating, and make a backup beforehand. ### 🛠️ **Dependency**: * [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) * [Forge Config Api Port](https://modrinth.com/plugin/forge-config-api-port) *(Fabric only)* ### 🌟 **Description** **Voiceless Survival** introduces an immersive challenge to Minecraft! Hostile mobs can now **hear your voice** through your microphone (via [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)) and react to the sounds you make. - **Speak cautiously:** Noise attracts mobs. - **Stay silent:** Avoid detection and survive longer. *** ### 📺 **See the Mod in Action!** Wanna see how it works in-game? Watch a gameplay video here: ### ✨ Features - ✅ 🎙️ **Voice-based sound detection** - ✅ ⚙️ **Customizable settings** - ✅ 🐾 **Supports all mobs** - ✅ 🔇 **Whispering mode** - ✅ 🏃‍♂️ **Flee feature** - ✅ 🔊 **Sound detection** - ✅ 🔫 **Gunfire detection** - ✅ 🥽 **Armor sound impact** - ✅ ⚡ **Mob speed boost** - ✅ 📁 **Configurable JSON files**: - `entity_voices.json` - `generalsounds.json` - `gunfire.json` (Only TACZ Versions) Command: `/ezvcsurvival config` Opens the **in-game configuration editor**. ### 🎮 **Gameplay Example**
🧟 Zombie Reaction > *What happens when you talk near a zombie?* ![Zombie Voice](https://i.imgur.com/o1bWTs8.gif)
🏃‍♂️ Flee Feature > *What happens when you talk near an animal?* ![Animal Voice](https://i.imgur.com/SprmLUi.gif)
🔊 Sound Effects > *How do mobs react to sounds?* ![Zombie Detection](https://i.imgur.com/Vr3nfyL.gif)
--- 🛠️ [**Configuration Guide**](https://github.com/armilp02/Voiceless-Survival/wiki/⚙%EF%B8%8FConfiguration-Guide) --- ### 🏆 **Credits** - **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)** by Max Henkel – Essential for microphone integration. - **Voiceless Survival** adds gameplay mechanics without redistributing Simple Voice Chat. - Special thanks to [SkyNetCloud](https://modrinth.com/user/SkyNetCloud) for porting the mod to the Fabric version. You can use the mod in your modpack without problems! ;)
